name: tokenos
description: TokenOS — AI cost optimizer for coding agents

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ext -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:extension"
scripts.dev:extension: cd extension && npm install && npm run build:webview && npm run watch
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm run setup && cd ../extension && npm install && cd webview && npm install
scripts.package:extension: cd extension && npm run compile && npm run build:webview && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository
